title: SpikeFood
description: Lets you craft any food with a potion to give it stackable effects when eaten.
body:
# Spike Food

Spike Food is a lightweight utility mod that allows players to infuse food items with potion effects. By crafting any edible item with any potion, the resulting food will apply that potion's effects to the player who consumes it.



_Note: Due to how Minecraft handles certain block-based foods, this mod currently does not support cake or similar modded food items._
